description: A practical and stylish choice of bag in black from kiara.  Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the high shine patent leather effect fabric and silver chain details will give a sophisticated look to any outfit.Height: 29cmWidth: 38cmDepth:12cmMade of synthetic leather for durabilityHas one large main zipped compartment with one internal zipped pocket and organiser pocketsTwo short handles attached to the bag with metal loopsSmall zipped pocket on backSilver coloured chain decoration on sides and chunky metal zip pullsMetal branding at frontCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust KIARA
